description: Style NoteThese stylish suspenders from arrow can be worn by men in place of a belt to perfectly capture a formal vintage style. Women can wear this with a short skirt, tights and a formal shirt for a classy borrowed-from-the-boys look.Product DetailsRed elastic adjustable strapsClip-on steel fasteners  Material and careElasticHandwash using a mild detergentSizeWidth of the strap: 1.5"
